# Black Iron Athletics

> Veteran-owned gym in Frisco, TX. Forging everyday people into everyday athletes through strength, community, and purpose. Since 2013.

## Quick Facts

- Location: 279 Main St #122, Frisco, TX 75036
- Phone: (972) 785-7036
- Founded: 2013
- Owner: Mike Manning (Owner & Head Coach)
- Hours: Open Gym access 7 days a week (between classes and after hours)
- Google Rating: 5.0 stars
- 3,000+ members transformed

## What We Offer

- Group Training (Strength & Conditioning, coach-led classes)
- Olympic Weightlifting
- HYROX Training
- Personal Training (1-on-1 coaching)
- Nutrition Coaching (macro-based, with FuelPath tracking tools)
- Open Gym
- Monthly Body Composition Scans

## Membership Options

- Standard: 3 classes per week
- Unlimited + Open Gym: Unlimited classes, open gym access 7 days a week (most popular)
- Personal Training: 1-on-1 custom coaching
- Open Gym Only: Self-directed access, 7 days a week between classes and after hours

Pricing is personalized. Book a free consultation to get started.

## Service Area

Frisco, Prosper, The Colony, Little Elm, McKinney, Plano, Celina, North Dallas
